info.name: Cherre GraphQL API
info.description: Cherre serves connected real-estate data (property, tax assessor, recorder/deeds, mortgages/liens, owners, parcel boundaries, demographics, connections) through a single GraphQL API built on Hasura. GraphQL operations are sent as HTTP POST to https://api.cherre.com/graphql, authorized with an OAuth 2.0 client-credentials bearer token. Endpoint and schema are representative; access is provisioned per customer via Cherre's Developer Portal.

item.name: Obtain an OAuth 2.0 client-credentials access token.

request.description: Exchange client credentials for a bearer access token used to authorize GraphQL requests.

item.name: Tax Assessor - records by ZIP code

request.description: Query resolved tax assessor / assessment records filtered by situs ZIP code.
Query recorder deeds/transfers with connected mortgage/lien records for a county FIPS.
Retrieve parcels whose geometry is contained within a custom-drawn boundary using a PostGIS spatial operator.
Aggregate (count, sum, avg) assessed value across a ZIP code.
Resolve an owner entity and its connected property holdings.
